properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and validate JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT token validity duration in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.upload.directory
properties.description: Filesystem directory where uploaded documents are stored.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Base URL for frontend links generated by the backend.

properties.name: app.init.default-users
properties.description: Whether startup should create the default application users.

properties.name: cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of frontend origins allowed by CORS.

properties.name: razorpay.key
properties.description: Razorpay API key used by the payment integration.

properties.name: razorpay.secret
properties.description: Razorpay API secret used by the payment integration.

properties.name: razorpay.webhook.secret
properties.description: Secret used to verify Razorpay webhook signatures.

properties.name: razorpay.test.mode
properties.description: Whether Razorpay should run in test mode.

properties.name: razorpay.mock.mode
properties.description: Whether payment processing should use local mock behavior.
